# License — Tildr Brand Assets

Copyright (c) 2026 OrbitBits. All rights reserved.

This folder contains the official logotype, logo variations, and brand assets of **Tildr**,
a project maintained by [OrbitBits](https://github.com/orbitbits).

These assets are the **exclusive property of OrbitBits** and are **not open source**.
They are not covered by the GNU Affero General Public License v3.0 that governs the Tildr source code.

---

## What is permitted

You MAY use the Tildr logotype solely for **referential purposes**, such as:

- Writing articles, blog posts, or documentation that mention or describe Tildr
- Giving talks or presentations that reference Tildr as a tool
- Linking to the official Tildr repository using the logo as a visual reference

All referential use must:

- Use the logo **unmodified** — no changes to colors, proportions, typography, or layout
- Make it **clear that Tildr and its logo are property of OrbitBits**
- Not imply any endorsement, partnership, or affiliation with OrbitBits

---

## What is prohibited

You MAY NOT, without prior written permission from OrbitBits:

- Use the Tildr logotype or any brand asset in another project, product, or software
- Modify, adapt, crop, recolor, or create derivative works based on the logo
- Use the logo in any commercial material, advertisement, or promotional content
- Redistribute or sublicense the logo files in any form
- Use the logo in a way that could cause confusion about the origin of a product or service
- Register or attempt to register the Tildr logo or any confusingly similar mark as a trademark

---

## Requesting permission

If you wish to use the Tildr logotype outside of the permitted cases above,
please open an issue at [github.com/orbitbits/tildr](https://github.com/orbitbits/tildr)
with the label `brand-request`, describing your intended use.

OrbitBits reserves the right to grant or deny permission at its sole discretion.

---

## Enforcement

Unauthorized use of the Tildr brand assets constitutes a violation of copyright law
and may result in legal action. OrbitBits actively enforces its intellectual property rights.

---
